caption: A woman with glasses, wearing a white garment and a light-colored shawl, speaks into a handheld microphone outdoors. In the top-left frame, images of several men are displayed in small boxes on the left and right sides of the screen, while the top banner contains the text "2024 में JD..." and the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo. A red banner at the bottom reads "BJP से डॉ. प्रेम कुमार नीतीश सरकार में मंत्री बने" and displays the time "10:08 PM." In the subsequent frames, the layout shifts. The left-side boxes now feature a man labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," while the right side shows men labeled "मंत्री संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार." The top banner text changes to "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" The bottom red banner and timestamp remain the same. The speaker remains centered, holding the microphone throughout the sequence.
